description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang-c++14 that runs on push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow should have two jobs: build-clang-cpp14-linux-stl and build-clang-cpp14-linux-no-stl, both running on ubuntu-22.04 with Clang C++14. Each job checks out the code, builds with cmake and make, and runs tests.
